description: Flaunt these lace-up high-top derby shoes crafted with brown fine leather from ganuchi and bring out the dandy in you. The pair comes with an extended fabric collar with the Ganuchi branding which can be laced up higher to keep your ankles warm or folded down for extra style. UpperLeather Derby style upper for durability and styleExtra fabric piece attached to collar which can be worn extended up or folded downLace-up system for a snug, customised  FitFabric lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dryCushioned footbed for all-day comfortPull loop for wearing ease OutsoleTextured patterns for enhanced tractionStacked heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
